# H5P

Siin on H5P harjutus.

## Interaktiivne sisu

::: {.callout-tip icon="false"}
## Peatükk annab ülevaate

- mis on pilvetehnoloogia,
- mis on pilveplatform,
- mis on pilveteenus,
- mis on suhtlus- ja sisuloome teenused.
:::

<iframe src="https://web.htk.tlu.ee/informaatika/infoyhiskond/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php?action=h5p_embed&amp;id=20" width="686" height="422" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" title="Sarnased teenused">

</iframe>

```{=html}
<script src="https://web.htk.tlu.ee/informaatika/infoyhiskond/wp-content/plugins/h5p/h5p-php-library/js/h5p-resizer.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
```
